market_health_reading: Combined unlocked FTT and FTT collateral were a large share of reported assets
Unlocked affiliated-token exposure created direct price and liquidity sensitivity
FTT collateral created circular risk between token value and borrow capacity
Use total reported assets as denominator for affiliated-token concentration
